test.name: UATSprint3-Report-001_ReportProblem_Success_ImageEvidence

kw.name: Open Fast Browser And Allow Noti
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: window.alert = function() { return true; }; window.confirm = function() { return true; };
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),'เข้าสู่ระบบ') or contains(text(),'Login')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'tab-button') and contains(text(),'จบทริปแล้ว')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'css:select.border-gray-300.rounded-lg' by value LOST_ITEM.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ทดสอบการรายงานปัญหา' into text field 'css:input[placeholder='โปรดระบุเรื่องของรายงาน']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'รายละเอียดของปัญหาสำหรับการทดสอบ Robot Framework Sprint 3' into text field 'css:textarea[placeholder='โปรดอธิบายรายละเอียดของปัญหา']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ทดสอบ' into text field 'xpath=//label[@id='Name']/following-sibling::div/input'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'นามสกุล' into text field 'xpath=//label[@id='last_name']/following-sibling::div/input'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Be On Tracking Page
Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

NoSuchDriverException: Message: Unable to obtain driver for chrome; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – ไม่เลือกหมวดหมู่ → ปุ่มส่งรายงานต้อง Disabled
test.status: Setup failed: Execution terminated by signal

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-004_Invalid_NoSubject
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – ไม่กรอกหัวข้อ → ปุ่มส่งรายงานต้อง Disabled
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-005_Invalid_NoDetail
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – ไม่กรอกรายละเอียด → ปุ่มส่งรายงานต้อง Disabled
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-006_Invalid_NoPhone
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – ไม่กรอกเบอร์โทรศัพท์ → ปุ่มส่งรายงานต้อง Disabled
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-007_Invalid_Emoji_Subject
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – กรอก Emoji ในช่องหัวข้อ → ปุ่มส่งรายงานต้อง Disabled
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-008_Invalid_Emoji_Detail
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – กรอก Emoji ในช่องรายละเอียด → ปุ่มส่งรายงานต้อง Disabled
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-009_Invalid_Emoji_Phone
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – กรอก Emoji ในช่องเบอร์โทรศัพท์ → ปุ่มส่งรายงานต้อง Disabled
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-010_Invalid_Emoji_Email
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – กรอก Emoji ในช่อง Email → ปุ่มส่งรายงานต้อง Disabled
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-011_Invalid_OversizeImage
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – อัพโหลดรูปภาพขนาดเกิน 10MB → ระบบแสดง error alert ทันทีโดยไม่ต้องกด submit
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-012_Invalid_OversizeVideo
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – อัพโหลดวิดีโอขนาดเกิน 30MB → ระบบแสดง error alert ทันทีโดยไม่ต้องกด submit
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: UATSprint3-Report-013_Invalid_OversizeFileCount
test.doc: ทดสอบ Invalid Input – อัพโหลดไฟล์เกินจำนวน (4 ไฟล์ เกิน max 3) → ระบบแสดง error alert ทันทีเมื่อพยายามเพิ่มไฟล์ที่ 4
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.
